title: 想問下整唔整得到WEB版同手機版LINK自動轉換/FORWARD?

replies.msg:
依家D FD一時用手機SHARE
一時電腦COPY LINK
我用緊電腦就睇唔到佢手機LINK
我電腦LINK SEND比佢手機佢又睇唔到
或者人地放D LINK又係 好困擾
我唸要等正式web 版先搞得掂

// ==UserScript==
// @name LIHKG App Url Replacer
// @description app shared link redirect to na.cx (web)
// @author 123321
// @version 1.3
// @include http://lihkg.com/*
// @include https://lihkg.com/*

// @namespace 1
// ==/UserScript==

var url = location.href;

if (location.href.search(".com")>0){
url = url.replace(".com",".na.cx");
location.href=url;
}



應該無問題，裝黎試下

firefox : https://addons.mozilla.org/zh-tw/firefox/addon/redirector/

chrome : https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/redirector/pajiegeliagebegjdhebejdlknciafen

safari : https://github.com/sjmulder/urlrewrite-safari


https://lihkg.com/thread/*/page/*

https://lihkg.na.cx/thread/$1/page/$2

firefox : https://addons.mozilla.org/zh-tw/firefox/addon/redirector/

chrome : https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/redirector/pajiegeliagebegjdhebejdlknciafen

safari : https://github.com/sjmulder/urlrewrite-safari


https://lihkg.com/thread/*/page/*

https://lihkg.na.cx/thread/$1/page/$2



唔記得講 實測後收左皮
